name: Turn on Bulb
description: Turn on Bulb — A wire-connecting puzzle game where you rotate tiles to complete the electrical circuit from plug to bulb . How to Play: Tap / Click any wire tile to rotate it 90° Connect all wires from the plug () to the bulb () When the full path is connected — bulb lights up and level complete!
instructions: Tap Click tile rarr rotate 90 deg clockwise Hint button rarr highlights the next wrong tile watch ad for more hints Reset rarr restart current level Home rarr go back to menu R key rarr reset level H key rarr use hint Esc key rarr go t
